message:
test(mermaid): add sequence diagram parser unit tests (bd-2kn9a)

Add 13 unit tests covering sequence diagram parser functionality:
- participant/actor declarations with aliases
- note positioning (left of, right of, over with multiple targets)
- activate/deactivate lifecycle parsing
- control blocks (loop, alt/else)
- AST-to-IR normalization for participants, notes, activations, controls
- stress fixture test exercising all constructs together

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
